title: Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:FOSL) Short Interest Down 44.3% in March
description: Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:FOSL – Get Free Report) saw a large decrease in short interest in March. As of March 13th, there was short interest totaling 3,424,481 shares, a decrease of 44.3% from the February 26th total of 6,149,857 shares. title: 'I visited ancient castle in Spain and realised why cost of ticket was so cheap'

title: Ancient Coptic Monastic Site Unearthed in Egypt Reveals Early Christian Life
description: Archaeologists in Egypt have discovered a 5th-century Christian monastic site, including a guesthouse, shedding light on the early development of Coptic monasticism. The site features paintings, inscriptions, a marble column, and pottery shards, providing insights into the era's architecture, art, and daily life.
